sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83795" key="plhktismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πληκ-τισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">amorous toying,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.209</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author></bibl>, pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
